theme: loading-dock pallet cache with a noisy runner forecast
title: Loading Dock Phase Shift: Calibrated Eviction
strategies: always-LRU: ignore the runner's forecast entirely, evict the least-recently-used pallet (reproduces the evaluator's weak baseline)

blind forecast trust: always evict whichever resident pallet the runner's forecast claims is safest (Belady-on-the-forecast); wins when the runner is reliable, gets actively misled when the runner is guessing or backwards

calibrated adaptive blend: use the given calibration shift (same recipe, different draw) to backtest several trust levels / phase-edge settings, then submit a policy that tracks the runner's recent hit-rate online and re-anchors its trust estimate whenever a miss-rate spike signals the workload's regime just changed
static 50/50 blend: average the forecast rank and recency rank with a fixed, non-adaptive weight -- steadier than blind trust but still blind to phase edges
